pred_reason: The SWC-101 label is justified by the confirmed reentrancy vulnerability in external calls like swapTokensForEth where state changes occur after these calls. SWC-107 is supported by the absence of integer overflow/underflow issues due to proper SafeMath usage, as verified in the audit. Evidence: Reentrancy found in swapTokensForEth with state changes after external calls; No integer overflow/underflow due to correct SafeMath implementation; Static analysis and code review both confirm these findings

SWC-107 is supported by the absence of integer overflow/underflow issues due to proper SafeMath usage, as verified in the audit.
